customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by company name, customer code, or billing name...
customers.field_customerCodeFull: Customer Code (auto-generated as CT-00001 if blank)

customers.field_salesChannels: Sales Channels (comma-separated, e.g. EC, Store, Streaming)
customers.addr_country: Country Code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. JP, US, GB)
customers.channels_desc: A customer can have multiple contact channels for different purposes (e.g., WhatsApp=Business, Discord=Shipping). Only one can be Primary (synced with Basic Info tab).
customers.discord_unchanged: * Discord settings will be preserved if no changes are made.
customers.deleteConstraint: Cannot delete if there are associated deals, orders, quotes, or invoices (please delete those first).
customers.channel_purposePlaceholder: e.g., for deals / for shipping notices

companies.title: Client Profiles
companies.branchNameHint: Branch name (used to distinguish multiple locations)
companies.setAsDefault: Set as default address for this type (one per type)
companies.countryCodeError: Country code must be 2 letters (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) or blank
companies.dedupResolveDesc: This client profile is provisionally registered as a duplicate candidate. Please review the data and decide whether to establish it as a separate client profile or merge it into an existing one.
companies.dedupUnsavedHint: You have unsaved changes. Please save basic info first
companies.dedupMergeHint: Merge into an existing client profile and delete this record
companies.dedupResolveConfirmMessage: Confirm "{{name}}" as a separate client profile and change its status to active? (This approves it as an independent client profile, not a merge. This action will be recorded in audit_logs.)
companies.unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard and navigate away?
companies.searchPlaceholder: Search by client profile name or code...
companies.companyCodeLabel: Client profile code (CO-00001, auto-generated if blank)
companies.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete "{{name}}" ({{code}})? Cannot delete if related deals, orders, quotes, invoices, or contacts exist.
companies.subtitle: Manage client information and addresses.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, or email...
contacts.primaryContactHint: Primary contact (only one per client profile; others auto-cleared on switch)

contacts.dedupConfirmMessage:
Confirm "{{name}}" ({{code}}) as a distinct contact and change status to active?

(Not a merge, but approval as an independent contact. Recorded in audit_logs.)
contacts.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete "{{name}}" ({{code}})? Cannot delete if related deals, orders, quotes, or invoices exist.

errorReason.user_denied: The connection was denied on Facebook. Please try again.
errorReason.state_mismatch: Security token mismatch. Please try connecting again.
errorReason.state_expired: Your connection session has expired. Please try again.

errorReason.no_pages: No manageable Facebook Pages were found. Please create a Page and try again.

mergeCompany.title: Merge as duplicate
mergeCompany.sourceDesc: Absorb "{{name}}" ({{code}}) into an existing client profile.
mergeCompany.selectMaster: Select master client profile to merge into
mergeCompany.searchPlaceholder: Filter by client profile name / code (server search)
mergeCompany.resultsCapped: {{count}} results reached. If the target client profile is not listed, filter by name / code (server will re-search).
mergeCompany.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Duplicate branch entry, CSV import duplicate
mergeCompany.confirmWarning: Warning: This action cannot be undone
mergeCompany.confirmDesc1: All contacts, deals, orders, quotes, invoices, addresses and sales channels linked to "{{sourceName}}" ({{sourceCode}}) will be reassigned to "{{masterName}}" ({{masterCode}}).
mergeCompany.confirmDesc2: The client profile record for "{{sourceName}}" will be deleted.
mergeCompany.confirmDesc3: If the master client profile was pending_dedup_review, it will automatically be promoted to active.
mergeCompany.confirmDesc4: This action will be recorded in audit_logs.

import.truncated: Many new entries — showing/importing the first {{max}} only

inbound.title: Discord Inbound Messages
inbound.subtitle: Inbound message log from suppliers on Discord. Inspect parse results and approval status.

review.title: Parse Result Review
review.subtitle: Review parsed Discord inbound items row-by-row: accept / skip / edit / reject.
review.versionConflict: Another reviewer updated this item first. Reloaded — please review again.

phaseSwitch.title: Spreadsheet parallel-run Phase
phaseSwitch.subtitle: Switch the Discord-ingestion operation mode (A / B / C). Phase B is the normal mode; Phase A is for emergency rollback only.
phaseSwitch.phaseADesc: Emergency rollback: only receive history is recorded, stock counts are not updated
phaseSwitch.phaseBDesc: Normal operation: CRM updates stock counts directly
phaseSwitch.phaseABanner: Currently in "emergency rollback" mode. Approvals will not update stock counts. Please return to normal operation (Phase B) as soon as possible.
phaseSwitch.outOfScope: Switching to Phase {{phase}} is not yet available (planned for a future release)
phaseSwitch.outOfScopeTooltip: Phase C requires full spreadsheet closure + bulk data migration, decided in a separate ADR.
phaseSwitch.tenantIdMissing: Failed to resolve tenant ID. Please log in again.
phaseSwitch.helpPhaseA: Phase A (emergency rollback): only receive history is recorded, stock counts are not updated. Not the normal mode.
phaseSwitch.helpPhaseB: Phase B (normal): stock counts are updated on approval. Spreadsheet data is used as reference data.
phaseSwitch.helpPhaseC: Phase C: full spreadsheet closure + bulk data migration. Currently disabled, separate ADR pending.

phaseAWarning.always: Currently in "emergency rollback" mode. Approvals will not update stock counts (receive history is still recorded). To return to normal operation, go to Management Center → Super Admin → Phase Switch.
phaseAWarning.afterApprove: Approved successfully, but stock counts were not updated due to "emergency rollback" mode. {{count}} receive history entries were recorded.

inventoryOffers.subtitle: Manage the "currently available products / stock / unit price" per supplier. Saved automatically when Discord parse review is approved, and editable manually here.
inventoryOffers.notFound: Offer not found (may have been deleted)

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage schedules and sync with Google Calendar.
schedule.notConnectedDesc: Once an admin connects a Google account, the calendar will appear here

inventoryVisibility.title: Inventory Visibility Settings
inventoryVisibility.subtitle: Configure how much inventory data each role can see (quantity / unit price / status).

keys.viewer: Minimum (name only; unit price + quantity masked)

inventoryVisibility.permissionRequired: You need tenant.inventory_visibility.edit permission to edit this screen

firebaseError.userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Please contact your administrator.
firebaseError.tooManyRequests: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
firebaseError.networkRequestFailed: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
firebaseError.operationNotAllowed: This sign-in method is not currently available. Please contact support.
firebaseError.expiredActionCode: This link has expired. Please start over.
firebaseError.invalidActionCode: This link is invalid. Please use the latest email.
firebaseError.requiresRecentLogin: For security, please sign out and sign in again before changing your password.
firebaseError.default: Sign-in failed. Please try again later. Contact support if the problem persists.
